rule: Remaining finish-second-source rows are not promotion safe. They require exact finish or number resolution before they can leave manual review.

mapped_blockers.reason_not_promoted: Evidence distinguishes cracked ice holo from the base card; this audit does not collapse cracked_ice into holo.
mapped_blockers.next_action: Classify as finish-label conflict unless an exact plain holo source is found.
evidence_labels: Bulbapedia release info identifies a Cracked Ice Holofoil version in the Plasma Claw Theme Deck.

PriceCharting base Druddigon #94 product includes non-holo/regular-sale context.
